task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "从微信客户端复制文章链接"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "分析网页HTML结构以定位文章内容"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "编写Python代码发起HTTP请求"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "解析HTML文档提取标题、作者和正文"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "处理动态加载内容（可选，使用Selenium）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "遵守合规性要求，确认使用场景合法性"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "识别HTML中小标题标签（如<h2>, <h3>）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "为小标题生成层级标记"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "验证抓取内容是否完整（通过特征标签数量或段落计数）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "弹出系统对话框供用户选择保存路径"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "清理非法文件名字符并生成带时间戳的文件名"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "将内容保存为TXT格式"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将内容保存为DOCX格式"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "捕获保存过程中可能发生的错误"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node3", "type": "provideLink"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "guideParsing"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "fetchHTML"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "handleDynamicContent"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node3", "type": "ensureCompliance"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "extractSubheadings"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "generateHierarchyTags"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node9", "type": "validateContentCompleteness"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "selectSavePath"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "generateFileName"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node13", "type": "generateFileName"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveAsTXT"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "saveAsDOCX"}]}
